title: Villagers demand mobile towers
summary: Residents in Molaiyanur panchayat demand mobile towers citing poor signal affecting education access and emergency communication in multiple remote villages.

title: Illegal liquor shops vandalised
summary: Villagers in Bodur near Pennagaram vandalised illegal liquor outlets after repeated complaints, leading to police arrests and investigation into unauthorized alcohol sales.

title: Health camp held after demand
summary: Authorities conducted a health camp in Karapadi village following prolonged public demand, providing first-time medical consultations amid lack of functioning anganwadi services.

title: Election contest intensifies locally
summary: Dharmapuri constituency witnesses intensified political activity as major candidates campaign actively, highlighting caste dynamics and regional voter mobilization strategies.

title: Fuel prices rise in district
summary: Petrol price in Dharmapuri increased to around ₹102.29 per litre, reflecting ongoing fuel cost fluctuations impacting daily commuters and local transportation expenses.

title: Village boycotts polling
summary: Residents of K Eechampadi village boycotted assembly elections protesting delay in relocating a government school despite repeated appeals to authorities.

title: Robots assist first-time voters
summary: Innovative robots welcomed and guided first-time voters at a Dharmapuri polling booth, improving engagement and awareness during recent assembly election process.

title: Rain forecast for western TN
summary: Weather department forecasts heavy rain and strong winds across western Tamil Nadu, potentially affecting Dharmapuri region with localized showers and changing conditions.

title: Connectivity concerns raised
summary: Poor telecom infrastructure in rural Dharmapuri continues to disrupt online education and emergency response, prompting renewed calls for infrastructure upgrades.

title: Public unrest over liquor issue
summary: Growing frustration over illegal liquor sales triggered community action in rural Dharmapuri, highlighting enforcement gaps and rising public dissatisfaction with authorities.
